name: quioteframework/session-gcs
description: Google Cloud Storage session backend for Quiote — a SessionPersistenceInterface implementation for SessionManager, backed by a minimal HMAC-key REST client (no google/cloud-storage dependency).

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/session-gcs/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
